TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jim_Bradley, title = Jim_Bradley, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jim_Bradley} }

S.FORM: Jim Bradley sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1952, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 3, Jim Bradley, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1982) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Jim Bradley sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1952, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 3, Jim Bradley, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1982) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *im βra*lej s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *im βra*lej, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
